Re-Elect

Mayor Alan Perry
Accomplishments Vision Support Sign Up
Support the Campaign

A proven leader for Hilton Head Island’s future

Re-Elect Mayor Alan Perry for a stronger, safer, more prosperous Hilton Head Island.

With more than 20 years of public service, Mayor Perry has helped drive smart growth, protect island character, and deliver results for families, workers, businesses, and visitors.

Sign Up to Support Vote, Volunteer, Donate
Public service
20+ Years
Tourism growth
$2.8B

Why this reelection matters

  • Keep Hilton Head Island fiscally responsible and future-ready.
  • Protect the island’s natural beauty, culture, and quality of life.
  • Invest in workforce housing, public safety, and infrastructure that lasts.

Election message

“Service, stewardship, and smart leadership for the next chapter.”

Track record

Real accomplishments. Measurable progress.

Mayor Perry’s leadership has focused on long-term planning, practical investments, and protecting the island’s unique identity while strengthening the economy.

20+ years of public service

A steady record of leadership built on listening, collaboration, and getting things done for residents.

$2.8B tourism revenue growth

Support for a healthy visitor economy that sustains local jobs and strengthens small businesses.

160 new businesses in 2024

A business-friendly climate that encourages entrepreneurship, investment, and year-round opportunity.

Modern services & planning

Progress on emergency services modernization and strategic infrastructure planning for the future.

Workforce housing initiatives

Support for essential workers who keep the island moving, from hospitality to healthcare and public service.

Public safety improvements

Focused investment in the systems and readiness needed to keep neighborhoods and visitors safe.

Sustainability & cultural preservation

Commitment to environmental stewardship and preserving Gullah Geechee heritage for future generations.

Leadership vision

A six-point plan to protect what makes Hilton Head Island exceptional.

1. Economic development that works for residents

Grow the local economy with strategic partnerships, careful planning, and support for year-round businesses.

2. Workforce housing solutions

Expand practical options so teachers, first responders, and service workers can live where they serve.

3. Safe neighborhoods and modern emergency services

Continue strengthening public safety, preparedness, and response capabilities across the island.

4. Infrastructure planning for the next generation

Invest wisely in roads, drainage, mobility, and essential systems before problems become crises.

5. Environmental sustainability

Protect waterways, trees, beaches, and resilient coastal systems that define island life.

6. Cultural preservation and community identity

Honor Gullah Geechee heritage and preserve the history, traditions, and stories that make Hilton Head Island unique.

Community engagement

Listen, learn, and lead with the community.

This campaign is built around open conversation and local connection. From neighborhood listening sessions to meet-and-greet events, residents can share priorities directly with Mayor Perry and the campaign team.

Neighborhood meet-and-greets

Small-group conversations across Hilton Head Island about safety, infrastructure, housing, and the economy.

Volunteer canvasses and phone banks

Join neighbors to spread the word, answer questions, and turn support into action.

Community updates

Stay informed with campaign news, event announcements, and opportunities to help.

Upcoming campaign events

Meet & Greet

Community Coffee Chat

Talk with supporters about the future of the island.

Volunteer Event

Weekend Canvass Kickoff

Help reach voters with campaign priorities and voter reminders.

Town Conversation

Lunchtime Leadership Forum

A focused discussion on infrastructure, housing, and growth.

Get Event Updates

How to help

Support the campaign in the way that works best for you.

Vote

Make a plan and encourage friends and neighbors to vote for proven leadership.

Volunteer

Help with events, outreach, and community engagement across the island.

Request a yard sign

Show your support at home, at your business, or in your neighborhood.

Contribute to keep the momentum going

Choose a preset amount or enter a custom contribution. Every donation helps share the campaign’s message and mobilize supporters.

Supporter sign-up

Join the team and stay connected.

Sign up to receive campaign updates, event invitations, volunteer opportunities, and important election reminders.

PayMeGPT AI campaign assistant

Ask about voting, events, volunteer opportunities, or Mayor Perry’s platform.

Campaign Assistant Widget

If the platform provides the embedded assistant, it will load here automatically.

We’ve received your information and will be in touch shortly with updates and ways to get involved.

Mayor Alan Perry for Hilton Head Island

Serving Hilton Head Island with experience, vision, and integrity.
